text.title: UI Component Library Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply UI Component Library end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: establish-layers
step.action: Place each component in tokens / primitives / patterns / templates.

step.name: story-coverage
step.action: Author Storybook story per component + state set.
step.decision-gate: Reject components without all states covered.

step.name: wire-visual-regression
step.action: Configure Chromatic / Percy / playwright; baseline snapshots.

step.name: release-process
step.action: Adopt changesets + semver + CHANGELOG; set deprecation_window_minors.
